brand_identity.name: Veikals
brand_identity.design_principle: Color is Function Only. High contrast, minimalist product focus. Asymmetry creates tension.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Use fluid scaling text-5xl to text-6xl+ for main hero.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use 2-3x more spacing (p-8, p-12). Optical alignment over geometric.
spacing_and_layout.bento_grid: Use Mode A 'Tetris Grid' for Marketing/Hero. Wide gap-8 to gap-12. Asymmetry and negative space are key.
spacing_and_layout.product_grid: Strict grid hierarchy. Product is hero. High-contrast 1px solid strokes for borders if needed, or pure borderless images with text underneath. Do not use generic card wrappers for products.

surface_strategies.header: Crystal Glass - bg-white/70 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 border-b border-black/10.
surface_strategies.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border, no shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-black/20.
surface_strategies.buttons: Sharp corners or subtle 2px radius. High contrast black bg, white text. Hover: lighter hue (e.g. hover:bg-neutral-800 hover:text-white).
surface_strategies.modals: Pure HTML/Tailwind styling overriding default Shadcn dialog. Solid #FFFFFF with sharp 1px border-black/10.

component_guidelines.hero_section: Big headline, 1-2 line value statement, 1 primary CTA, minimal text. Use Hero image in background with bg-white/30 overlay to ensure text contrast, or a split asymmetrical layout.
component_guidelines.chatbot_widget: Persistent bottom-right floating launcher. MUST use labelled button (e.g., 'Ask AI' or 'Need help?'), not just an icon. Contextual greeting (e.g., 'Hi! I can help you find products or track orders.'). Provide 2-3 quick replies first. Keep bot messages short and chunked.
component_guidelines.product_cards: Image dominant (aspect-square or 3:4). Brief description, price, add to cart button below. No heavy card boxes - let the image breathe.
component_guidelines.navigation: Clear top navigation, visible on desktop, no hamburger on desktop.
component_guidelines.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn customized components. Hard sharp borders (rounded-none or max 4px). Always explicit hover/focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black).

icons.instructions: Use for dense navigation, UI adornments, and minimalist cart/user actions. Duotone weight.

hero_background.description: Abstract luxury soft gradient and sharp glass shapes light theme.

perfume_product_2.description: Luxury men's perfume bottle on rustic wood

instructions_to_main_agent: Use raw HTML/Tailwind for marketing layouts (Hero, Bento Grids) rather than generic Shadcn wrapper components.
Use Shadcn UI for logical components (Dropdowns, Tabs, Select, Dialogs) but heavily customize spacings and remove default rounded edges (use rounded-none or rounded-sm).
Ensure products (clothing, iPhone 17 Pro Max, perfumes) map directly to images provided in the media object. NEVER use placeholders.
All interactive elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g. data-testid='add-to-cart-button').
Execute `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react` for the icon library.
Ensure the floating chatbot widget is initialized on page load, remains in bottom-right, and prompts users contextually with clear visual hierarchy.
